evals.prompt: I need to add password reset to an existing app. Run this through harness engineering, but do not implement yet.
evals.expected_output: Creates a work order with business rules, acceptance criteria, edge cases, and off-limits; stops before implementation.

evals.prompt: Here is a work order for login rate limiting. Produce the TDD plan and tell me whether the first plan should be rejected before coding.
evals.expected_output: Produces a TDD plan mapped to acceptance criteria, identifies at least one plausible missing edge case or explains why none is missing, and does not implement.

evals.prompt: Our repo has hundreds of old lint failures, but I want agents to stop shipping new lint/type/secret problems. Design the Andon Cord station.
evals.expected_output: Recommends a ratcheted gate strategy for new or modified code, a gate map, hard-fail behavior, and rules against bypassing or weakening checks.

evals.prompt: A production bug escaped: users can reuse a refresh token twice during a race. Fix it the harness way.
evals.expected_output: Classifies the escaped station, adds or proposes a regression test and upstream rule, then scopes the fix and evidence instead of only patching the bug.
